topic: People with thicker thighs live longer — the blood sugar mechanism
caption: Did you know thicker thighs are linked to a lower risk of chronic diseases? 🏋️‍♀️ It all comes down to blood sugar control. Research shows that people with more muscle mass in their thighs have better insulin sensitivity, reducing their risk of developing type 2 diabetes and heart disease. 💡 This is because the muscles in your thighs act as a 'glucose sink', absorbing excess glucose from the bloodstream. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #BloodSugarControl #ThickerThighs #Longevity #InsulinSensitivity #Type2Diabetes #HeartDisease #GlucoseSink
